message:
feat(ext): expand all SQLite extension crate implementations

Substantially flesh out the extension crate implementations across
all seven extension modules to bring them closer to production parity
with upstream SQLite extension behavior:

- fsqlite-ext-fts3: +286 lines — tokenizer pipeline, term matching,
  and ranking function scaffolding; add new Cargo dependency
- fsqlite-ext-fts5: +681 lines — custom tokenizer API, phrase queries,
  BM25 ranking, and auxiliary function registration
- fsqlite-ext-icu: +256 lines — ICU collation sequences, case folding,
  and locale-aware string comparison
- fsqlite-ext-json: +553 lines — JSON path extraction, json_each/
  json_tree virtual table implementations, and type coercion
- fsqlite-ext-misc: +333 lines — miscellaneous extension functions
  (uuid, regexp, ieee754, carray)
- fsqlite-ext-rtree: +348 lines — R*-tree index callbacks, geometry
  constraint checking, and custom query optimization
- fsqlite-ext-session: +709 lines — changeset/patchset generation,
  conflict resolution callbacks, and session attachment lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
